titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday June 4, 2023 at 09:41

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, motion pictures
did.abstract: The materials consist of 16mm motion picture films and videotapes of athletic events at Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-C (YRG 38-C), Audiovisual materials and memorabilia documenting athletics at Yale.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Original motion picture films and videotapes may not be played. Researchers should consult with a reference archivist for policies and procedures governing the creation of use copies.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copies of commercially produced audiovisual materials contained in this collection cannot be made for researcher use outside of the repository.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures (RU 839). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of 16mm motion picture films and videotapes of athletic events at Yale.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at beinecke.library@yale.edu to request access.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives.
